user.title: Connect to Eau du Grand Lyon
user.description: Enter your credentials for the customer portal {site_url}

error.invalid_auth: Incorrect credentials. Please check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the server. Check your network.
error.waf_blocked: Request blocked by web firewall. Increase the update interval (recommended: {recommended_interval}h) or wait a few minutes.
error.api_error: API error. Check the status of the Eau du Grand Lyon service.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Eau du Grand Lyon Options
init.description: Configure update interval, price per m³, and experimental mode.

data_description.price_entity: Optional: Select an entity (e.g. sensor.water_price) to use as the current price instead of the static value.
data_description.experimental_api: Enables new /rest/produits/ endpoints discovered in the 2026 Angular bundle: real invoices, daily estimated leaks, load curves. Automatic fallback to old endpoints is always active.
data_description.household_size: Used to calculate the Eco-Score and personalised Eco-Coach tips.
data_description.water_hardness: Water hardness in French degrees (°fH). Lyon average: {hardness_lyon_avg} °fH. If you have a softener, set to the output hardness (e.g. 10-15 °fH).
data_description.subscription_annual: Annual fixed subscription cost (excluding consumption). Visible on your annual invoice. Ex. Grand Lyon 2024: ~{subscription_example} €/yr. Leave at 0 to exclude the subscription from cost calculations.
data_description.update_interval_hours: How often the integration polls the Eau du Grand Lyon servers. Since data is updated monthly, 24h is recommended to avoid WAF blocking.
data_description.tarif_m3: Water price in euros per m³, used for all estimated cost calculations. Check your latest invoice for the exact rate (Grand Lyon 2024: ~5.20 €/m³).

clear_cache.name: Clear local cache
clear_cache.description: Deletes the persistent cache (history and recorded consumption) and resets the sensors.

update_now.name: Update now
update_now.description: Forces an immediate synchronisation with the Eau du Grand Lyon servers.

export_data.name: Export data
export_data.description: Exports consumption history to a local CSV file.

path.name: File path
path.description: Full path of the CSV file (e.g. /config/exports/eau.csv)

download_latest_invoice.name: Download latest invoice
download_latest_invoice.description: Downloads the PDF of the most recent available invoice.

path.name: Destination path
path.description: Full path of the PDF file (e.g. /config/www/invoice.pdf)

drought_alert.title: Drought Alert: Level {level}
drought_alert.description: The Rhône department is currently at the **{level}** restriction level. Water usage restrictions (watering, car washing, etc.) apply. Check the prefecture's website for more details.

long_outage.title: Prolonged API outage (Eau du Grand Lyon)
long_outage.description: The integration has not been able to synchronize with the server for more than 7 days. Please check your credentials and the official website status.
